tasks.step: Implement validation for empty or blank strings

tasks.notes: Implemented help command and help flags (--help and -h) in src/cli.ts to display usage instructions and exit 0.
Added comprehensive Jest test suite in tests/cli.test.ts testing version/help flags, validation logic, and add/serve stubs.
All CLI unit tests pass, compilation succeeds, and linter check succeeds. Verification check complete.
